20:49 â December 30, 2020
Update to the Digital & payment Services Fee Schedule, Form 2725
We updated the Digital & Payment Services Fee Schedule, Form 2725, as announced in the
2021 Indicative Pricing for Digital and Payment Services
communication published September 30, 2020, on the secure site. Additional changes are described
here
.
The Digital & Payment Services Fee Schedule, Form 2725, is available to BC and Ontario Class A credit unions only. The fee changes come into effect January 1, 2021.
